title: autobench.improver.prediction v1
description: AHE (Agent Harness Evolution) prediction contract. Improver self-declares a falsifiable prediction about the NEXT iteration's outcome at the moment it proposes a delta. Verified the iteration after via autobench.improver.prediction.verified.v1. Source: /autobench. Lifecycle fields (active, parent_prediction_id, fact_fingerprint, prediction_id, lifecycle_status) added for Bitloops-style guidance fact lifecycle management.

iteration.description: RSI iteration in which the prediction was emitted (about iteration+1)

predicted_score_delta.description: Improver's predicted change in aggregate_score for the next iteration (signed)

predicted_verdict_class_changes.description: Predicted signed count delta per verdict letter, e.g. {"TLE": -3, "OK": +3}

model.description: Improver model name that produced the prediction

active.description: Whether this prediction is the active one for its scope. False when superseded or deduplicated.

parent_prediction_id.description: ID of the prediction this one superseded, if any.

fact_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hex of normalized predicted_score_delta+rationale for deduplication.

source_scope_key.description: Temporal scope key: ahe:{session_id}:{problem_id}:{iteration}. Used to invalidate prior predictions on re-distillation.
